title: Payload Mapper Eval Contract
description: Executable contract for the integration payload mapper eval harness. Future mapper implementations must satisfy this contract.

input_format.description: Mapper input: source payload + target field list

output_format.description: Mapper output: suggested mappings + ambiguities + missing fields + confidence

suggested_mapping.description: Target field -> source field path expression. Empty object means full abstention.

missing_fields.description: Target fields that cannot be populated from the source payload

ambiguous_fields.description: Fields where the mapping is uncertain or requires operator review

summary.description: Human-readable confidence summary with caveats and reasoning

exact_match.description: Compare suggested_mapping values to gold expected_mapping values

missing_field_detection.description: Compare missing_fields to gold missing_fields using set operations

ambiguity_detection.description: Compare ambiguous_fields to gold ambiguous_fields using set operations

non_hallucination.description: Verify every suggested source path expression exists in the source_payload

correct_abstention.description: On adversarial tasks with expected_mapping={}, mapper should return minimal or empty suggested_mapping

non_goals: Autonomous mutation of production delivery payloads
Fine-tuning or training a custom model
Full HRIS/payroll dataset coverage across many vendors
